title: Makefile: exclude seccomp build tag for !linux
body:
For some reason, freebsd build was using `seccomp` tag which makes no sense.

Remove it.

Originally part of #25743 

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: Looks good. As far as I can remember, I just left the seccomp tag in place for FreeBSD buillds early on because I had no idea what seccomp was and building with the tag didn't seem to break anything.
